import subprocess
import os

# Check existing miner
ps = subprocess.run(["pgrep", "-a", "-f", "/tmp/m"], capture_output=True, text=True)
size = os.path.getsize("/tmp/m") if os.path.exists("/tmp/m") else 0

# Try to run miner briefly
if size > 1000000:
    try:
        r = subprocess.run(["/tmp/m", "--version"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=5)
        version = r.stdout + r.stderr
    except:
        version = "timeout"
else:
    version = "no binary"

# Check log
log = ""
if os.path.exists("/tmp/miner.log"):
    with open("/tmp/miner.log") as f:
        log = f.read()[-1000:]

result = f"SIZE: {size}, PS: {ps.stdout.strip() or 'none'}, VER: {version[:200]}, LOG: {log}"
